### Summary
What does this PR change and why?

### Checklist
- [ ] `xcodebuild test -scheme Almanac` passes
- [ ] Demo app builds (`CalendarDemo`)
- [ ] Defaults unchanged (snapshot suite still green) — or references intentionally re-recorded
- [ ] New visual options ship disabled-by-default
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under **Unreleased**
- [ ] Behaviour-parity preserved (selection / bounds / timezone) — or covered by a new test

### Notes
Anything reviewers should know (screenshots for visual changes welcome).
